revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-47

VTS Operator Course Certificate is a document awarded by the training organisation, to indicate that a trainee has achieved successful completion of an accredited IALA Model Course i.e. V-103/1 VTS Operator Training, V-103/2 VTS Supervisor Training, V-103/3 VTS On-the-Job Training and V-103/4 On-the-Job Training Instructor.  This course certificate alone should not be an authorisation to operate.


Source: IALA Recommendation V-103 (2009)

(VTS33/output/8 refers) 

{{languages|VTS Operator Course Certificate}}
